content.full_text:
May 16, 2002

Ash Pirayou
Pirayou Law Offices
125 South Market Street, Suite 1160
San Jose, CA 95113

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-262

Dear Mr. Pirayou:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of May 10, 2002, this letter is to confirm that you have withdrawn your letter seeking general assistance regarding the campaign provisions of the Political Reform Act.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call our office toll-free at (866) 275-3772.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
General Counsel

By: [signature]
Natalie Bocanegra
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

NB:jg
